title: Create LocalSend transfer path
goal: Set up a low-friction local transfer path between heim-pc, iPad and Samsung A54 for screenshots, PDFs, diffs and logs without cloud detours.

acceptance.assertion: A local inbox path such as /home/alex/Incoming/LocalSend is defined.
At least one transfer direction is smoke-tested or blocked with device-side missing prerequisite recorded.
LocalSend does not become an archival or authority layer; received files are triaged into the appropriate repo/document/archive path.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Infra PR #107 GitHub CI validate passed.
scripts/utilities/heim-utilities-smoke.sh reported Backrest, Beszel, Stirling PDF, Paperless, Atuin, Difftastic, rga and LocalSend OK.
Restic util-base-v1 snapshot and single-file restore probe passed.
Paperless imported synthetic PDF document id 1 and indexed content containing UTIL-BASE-V1.
Stirling PDF converted the probe PDF to text and merged two copies into a 2-page PDF.
Docling 2.111.0 converted the probe PDF to Markdown and JSON with UTIL-BASE-V1 content.
metadata.blocked_details: LocalSend user Flatpak is installed and local inbox exists, but cross-device transfer requires iPad or Samsung A54 interaction.
metadata.partial_outcome: Infrastructure/runtime prerequisite is present, but acceptance requires user/UI/device/audio interaction that should not be automated blindly.
